articles.description: The most consequential decision in the history of VAR in the Premier League is played out over four minutes 11 seconds of drama at London Stadium.

articles.description: Match of the Day pundit Danny Murphy explains why Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta deserves credit after his side beat West Ham to take a huge step towards the Premier League title.
articles.title: Danny Murphy column: 'Only his last changes worked' - how Arteta's gambles finally paid off

articles.description: When the dust settles on the West Ham goal that was ruled out against Arsenal, the cold reality is they are now probably facing relegation.

articles.description: Khadija Shaw needed just 12 minutes to prove why Manchester City must not let her leave in the summer.
articles.title: Why Manchester City would be foolish to let Khadija Shaw leave

articles.description: Debutant Tilly Corteen-Coleman and stand-in captain Charlie Dean provide optimism for England despite underwhelming win over New Zealand.
articles.title: England vs New Zealand: Tilly Corteen-Coleman and Charlie Dean give reasons for optimism despite familiar failings

articles.description: Elliot Anderson's crucial equaliser against Newcastle for Nottingham Forest was even more admirable given the huge personal loss he has suffered.
articles.title: Nottingham Forest: Elliot Anderson character shown after mum's death

articles.description: This season hasn't always been easy on the eye, but Arsenal are on the brink of their first Premier League title in 22 years.
articles.title: Arsenal: Gunners are champions in waiting but doing it the hard way

articles.description: Alex Fitzpatrick's hopes of a first individual win on the PGA Tour are dashed as Kristoffer Reitan instead earns a maiden victory at the Truist Championship.
articles.title: Truist Championship: Kristoffer Reitan earns maiden PGA win as Alex Fitzpatrick falters

articles.description: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick thanks his team and the fans for their support after he took charge of them in Sunday's El Clasico against Real Madrid despite the death of his father.
articles.title: El Clasico: Hansi Flick thanks fans after leading Barcelona to La Liga title despite father's death
